subject: Re: FW: Project Updates
body:
thanks.... unfortunately it appears that I will have
to be in the middle east,. during your conference...
so I will both be unable to attend , and of course not
be able to take anyone on the plane...    second... I
am unclear about your proposal... are you committing
to have  a finished mock up of kits,,,luxury and
mass,by the end of februrary.. or exactly what is it
that you are in fact comitting to//// 

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>  
> 
>   _____  
> 
> From: Wurman@aol.com [mailto:Wurman@aol.com] 
> Sent: Wednesday, November 23, 2005 5:45 PM
> To: lesley@nysgllc.com
> Subject: Project Updates
> 
> 
> Jeffrey & Ghislaine
> 
> 1.     I am enthusiastic about the project as you
> both know
> 2.     I believe that, although its initiation came
> from the notion of the
> highest end product for the wealthiest people, the
> trickle-down effect could
> make it into a serious ongoing business down to the
> scale of the classic
> home/car/small business first aid kit.
> 3.     I need ASAP; the group of kits that Ghislaine
> brought here for her
> quick show & tell about a week ago.  My timetable is
> as follows.  I will
> review those kits between when I receive them till
> when I go away for my
> Christmas holiday (12/18).  I will immerse myself
> enough in it to have a
> several day meeting with my associate Nigel Holmes
> here during the very
> first few days of January and plan at that time to
> develop a two-stage
> series of ideas and comps.  The first perhaps
> completed just prior to my
> conference to be able to review with you there.  And
> a more final
> presentation of the direction and comps in the 3rd
> week of February in New
> York.
> 4.     As you know, I have difficulty just to work
> for hire without seeing
> some rainbow at the end of the tunnel or percentage
> of a company that I
> would like to help construct and develop as I have
> in the past.  The initial
> cost for my time and my team's time, Nigel and the
> young lady who helped me
> with the Understanding Healthcare book, will be
> $125,000 through the end of
> February.
> 
> Additional items:
> Attached is the initial list of names for your 727
> to the conference.
> Registration begins at 10 AM on 1 February.  The
> first session is at 1:30 PM
> and it really opens large with Nicholas Negroponte
> showing his $100 computer
> and hopefully Rupert Murdoch presenting, and it goes
> on from there (see
> attached schedule).  If you could give me some idea
> of the times that you
> would leave and then arrive at Van Nuys, I would
> like to start sending that
> schedule out to the designated hitters on your
> plane.
> 
> GM mentioned the possible availability of TamiFlu
> when she was here and I
> sure would like to have a small hoard of it to
> assuage my terror.
> 
> You had mentioned and I mentioned to you again in
> your office, your
> friendship with David Copperfield and the
> possibility that you might invite
> him to eg.  Should you have people like Copperfield
> and others who you would
> like to have come, please just tell me their names
> and I would be happy to
> make arrangements to comp some of your friends.
> 
> You had mentioned a meeting down in the Virgin
> Islands, possibly at Little
> Jeff Island or in St. Thomas on the 15 March, and I
> would be quite
> interested.
> 
> RSW 
> 



	
		
__________________________________

http://mail.yahoo.com
body_html:
thanks.... unfortunately it appears that I will have
to be in the middle east,. during your conference...
so I will both be unable to attend , and of course not
be able to take anyone on the plane... second... I
am unclear about your proposal... are you committing
to have a finished mock up of kits,,,luxury and
mass,by the end of februrary.. or exactly what is it
that you are in fact comitting to////

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Wurman@aol.com [mailto:Wurman@aol.com]
Sent: Wednesday, November 23, 2005 5:45 PM
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Subject: Project Updates

Jeffrey & Ghislaine

  1. I am enthusiastic about the project as you

both know
2. I believe that, although its initiation came
from the notion of the
highest end product for the wealthiest people, the
trickle-down effect could
make it into a serious ongoing business down to the
scale of the classic
home/car/small business first aid kit.
3. I need ASAP; the group of kits that Ghislaine
brought here for her
quick show & tell about a week ago. My timetable is
as follows. I will
review those kits between when I receive them till
when I go away for my
Christmas holiday (12/18). I will immerse myself
enough in it to have a
several day meeting with my associate Nigel Holmes
here during the very
first few days of January and plan at that time to
develop a two-stage
series of ideas and comps. The first perhaps
completed just prior to my
conference to be able to review with you there. And
a more final
presentation of the direction and comps in the 3rd
week of February in New
York.
4. As you know, I have difficulty just to work
for hire without seeing
some rainbow at the end of the tunnel or percentage
of a company that I
would like to help construct and develop as I have
in the past. The initial
cost for my time and my team's time, Nigel and the
young lady who helped me
with the Understanding Healthcare book, will be
$125,000 through the end of
February.

Additional items:
Attached is the initial list of names for your 727
to the conference.
Registration begins at 10 AM on 1 February. The
first session is at 1:30 PM
and it really opens large with Nicholas Negroponte
showing his $100 computer
and hopefully Rupert Murdoch presenting, and it goes
on from there (see
attached schedule). If you could give me some idea
of the times that you
would leave and then arrive at Van Nuys, I would
like to start sending that
schedule out to the designated hitters on your
plane.

GM mentioned the possible availability of TamiFlu
when she was here and I
sure would like to have a small hoard of it to
assuage my terror.

You had mentioned and I mentioned to you again in
your office, your
friendship with David Copperfield and the
possibility that you might invite
him to eg. Should you have people like Copperfield
and others who you would
like to have come, please just tell me their names
and I would be happy to
make arrangements to comp some of your friends.

You had mentioned a meeting down in the Virgin
Islands, possibly at Little
Jeff Island or in St. Thomas on the 15 March, and I
would be quite
interested.

RSW

Yahoo! Mail - PC Magazine Editors' Choice 2005
http://mail.yahoo.com
